name: Frijoles Rancheros
keywords: beans meats mexican side dish vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the bacon by cooking it until crispy.
2. Seed and chop the jalapeño chiles.
3. Finely chop the garlic.
4. Chop the onion into 1 cup.
5. Combine the ingredients in a bowl or pot: add the cooked bacon, chopped jalapeño chiles, finely chopped garlic, chopped onion, beer, vinegar, and ground red chile to taste.
6. Add the drained pinto beans and tomato paste to the mixture.
7. Mix well to combine all ingredients.
